creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #7)

Yes. Basically, it has a correct statement - for PERC H730P mrsas driver is a better(and proper) option. I.e. mfi shouldn't even be picked up by the kernel by default for it.

After switching to mrsas we've seen double in performance and overall bandwidth, not to mention disappearing of those weird I/O error bugs.
